name: Axiomatic Set Theory — Ordinals, Cardinals & Choice
description: Well-ordering, ordinals (transitive ∈-well-ordered sets), transfinite induction, cardinals, and equivalence of Axiom of Choice with well-ordering theorem and Zorn's lemma.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefWO["Def: Well-ordering\nlinear order, every subset has min"]
    DefOrd["Def: Ordinal\ntransitive, ∈-well-ordered"]
    DefCard["Def: Cardinal\n|A| = least ordinal equinumerous"]
    T1["Thm: Well-Ordering\nAC ⟺ every set well-orderable"]
    T2["Thm: Transfinite Induction\non ordinals"]
    T3["Thm: Zorn ⟺ AC\nZorn's lemma equivalent to Choice"]
    A10["Axiom of Choice"]
    A10 --> T1
    DefWO --> DefOrd
    DefOrd --> T2
    DefOrd --> DefCard
    T1 --> T3
    classDef axiom fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff,stroke:#c0392b
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class A10 axiom
    class DefWO,DefOrd,DefCard definition
    class T1,T2,T3 theorem
